home.title: Configuration
home.subtitle: Set up the Telegram notification and CRM parameters, then proceed to the skin analysis form.
home.form_desc: Configure Telegram bots, CRM IDs, and language before starting.
home.chat_ids_help: Enter one or more Telegram chat IDs separated by commas.
home.bot_index_help: Which Telegram bot to use (from the bots table).

footer.disclaimer: This tool is intended only for cosmetic awareness purposes. Skin scores may vary based on applied makeup. Results are not a substitute for professional dermatological advice.

landing.hero_subtitle: One camera. Twelve clinical metrics. A plan your skin actually asked for.
landing.how_subtitle: No questionnaires, no skin-type quizzes. The camera does the reading — your routine updates every time you scan.
landing.how_step1_text: Natural light, no makeup. Hold steady for three seconds — we auto-capture five frames, pick the sharpest.
landing.how_step2_text: Hydration, barrier, pore visibility, tone evenness, redness, fine lines, sebum, texture and four more — all mapped to skin zones.
landing.how_step3_text: A plain-English readout — what's strong, what's stressed, what's changed since last time. Zones highlighted, trends tracked.
landing.how_step4_text: Products matched to your exact metrics. We tell you which ingredient does which job — and when to use them.
landing.metrics_subtitle: Each metric has a clinical proxy — hydration tracks stratum-corneum moisture cues, barrier tracks transepidermal water-loss indicators, and so on. Scores are 0–100, relative to your demographic cohort.
landing.metrics_methodology: Methodology and confidence intervals published quarterly · last update April 2026
landing.demo_subtitle: Here's a real analysis running — three regions of interest, bars filling as the model resolves each metric. Your scan looks exactly like this.
landing.products_subtitle: Our AI matches HL/Skin products to your exact metrics. Each recommendation comes with ingredient breakdowns and routine placement.
landing.science_subtitle: Every product is broken down to its active ingredients, cross-referenced against your metrics. Three we lean on the most — and why.
landing.science_niacinamide_desc: The ingredient that quietly fixes four things at once: strengthens ceramide synthesis, calms redness, regulates sebum, and softens hyperpigmentation. Works at 2–5%.
landing.science_bakuchiol_desc: The retinol alternative your barrier can tolerate. Up-regulates collagen expression without the peeling, photo-sensitivity or pregnancy caveats of tretinoin.
landing.science_tranexamic_desc: The gold standard for stubborn melasma and post-inflammatory pigmentation. Interrupts the melanocyte-keratinocyte pathway — without irritating a sensitive barrier.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Your first scan and your first plan are free — forever. If you want history, trends, and on-demand scans, there's a plan for that.
landing.pricing_disclaimer: Prices in USD. No hidden fees. You own your scan data — export or delete anytime.
landing.plan_free_desc: One scan. One plan. No card needed. Ever.
landing.plan_plus_desc: Scan anytime. Track changes. Rebalance your routine as your skin shifts.
landing.plan_pro_desc: For estheticians, content creators, and anyone running skin journeys for clients.

scan.title: Skin Analysis

scan.tip4: Ensure your full face is visible
scan.no_photo: Please capture or upload a photo first.

step4.supplements_label: Do you take any supplements for your skin? (e.g., collagen)

step6.sleepHours_label: How many hours do you normally sleep?

step8.recommendation_label: Would you like us to recommend a routine tailored to your skin and goal?

step9.title: Upload Your Photo
step9.subtitle: Take a clear photo of your face or upload an existing one for the AI analysis.

results.title: Your Skin Analysis
results.form_data_desc: All the information you provided during your skin scan.

metrics_desc.oily_skin: This measures the amount of excess oil or sebum on the skin. A balanced score suggests the skin is producing oil at a normal level without being overly greasy.
metrics_desc.uneven_skin_tone: This refers to irregularities in skin color, such as redness, dull areas, or patches of discoloration. A better score means the complexion looks more even and uniform.
metrics_desc.eye_wrinkles: This evaluates the presence of wrinkles around the eye area. A higher score indicates smoother skin and fewer visible lines in this delicate area.
metrics_desc.crows_feet: This measures the fine lines that appear at the outer corners of the eyes. A stronger result means these lines are less noticeable.
metrics_desc.radiance: This shows how bright, fresh, and healthy the skin looks. A high score means the skin appears luminous and full of vitality.
metrics_desc.firmness: This measures how tight, elastic, and resilient the skin is. A good score suggests the skin has strong support and less visible sagging.
metrics_desc.hydration: This indicates the level of moisture in the skin. Well-hydrated skin tends to look plumper, healthier, and more comfortable.
metrics_desc.dark_spots: This evaluates the visibility of pigmentation marks or areas of discoloration. A higher score means dark spots are minimal or less visible.
metrics_desc.smoothness: This measures how soft and even the surface of the skin feels and looks. A high score suggests refined, polished-looking skin.
metrics_desc.fine_lines_wrinkles: This assesses the overall appearance of expression lines and wrinkles across the face. A better score means they are less visible.
metrics_desc.texture: This refers to the overall condition and consistency of the skin's surface. A very high score suggests the skin looks refined, even, and well-balanced.
metrics_desc.dark_circles: This measures the appearance of darkness under the eyes. A high score means the under-eye area looks brighter and less tired.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we handle your data.
privacy.data_handling: Facial images are transmitted over HTTPS and processed but NOT permanently stored. Only the JSON analysis results and your email are stored in our database. Images are automatically deleted after 24 hours.
privacy.consent: By using our service, you consent to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
privacy.contact: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us.
